content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions are met:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data"}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions are met:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data

# Table: process_rules

process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%';

content.text: {"success":false,"error":"You can only execute one statement at a time.","message":"SQL execution failed"}

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')

CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS SELECT t."HAUS", t."ANLAGE", t."ME_MA_ID", t."EQUNR", t."HOUSE_NUM1", t."ENTSCHEIDUNG", eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON t.ANLAGE = eg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR

UPDATE J09B_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT e1.EQUNR FROM eabl e1 JOIN eabl e2 ON e1.EQUNR = e2.EQUNR WHERE e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the J09B mandatory reading entries.
Please find attached the J09B meter reading entries excluding mandatory reading cases.

kwargs.content:
Process J09B completed.

- Exported `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` with 792 rows and sent it to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
- Exported `J09B.csv` with 19,388 rows and sent it to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Temporary table `J09B_temp` deleted

Note: a working table `J09B_final` was created during processing and was not deleted, because the process only specified deleting the temporary table.
